creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rafan       2008-03-24 12:52:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/beediff     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    textproc/beediff/files patch-beediff.pro 
  Log:
  BeeDiff is a graphical file comparator.  User have a possibility
  to compare and merge a two text files.  All differences are highlighted
  in colors.
  
  WWW: http://www.beesoft.org/beediff.html
  
  PR:             ports/122010
  Submitted by:   Max Brazhnikov <makc at issp.ac.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1227    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/textproc/beediff/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/beediff/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/textproc/beediff/files/patch-beediff.pro (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/textproc/beediff/pkg-descr (new)
